name: misar-dev
description: Complete AI-powered audit suite — 16 categories + 3D Router + MisarCoder MCP (free MoE engine) + Guardrails MCP (content safety, prompt injection, PII scan) + Guardian MCP (Semgrep SAST, dependency audit, secret scanning, license check, security headers) + Git Manager (branch/PR/cleanup workflow enforcement) + Website Auditor (SEO, Accessibility, Performance, Security, Mobile, Content, Compliance — Deep/Quick/Source modes) + MisarDefender (local macOS security daemon). Interactive flag prompting, parallel subagent dispatch, 90-97% token savings.
